mapper.select: SELECT p.id FROM project p WHERE p.created_by = #{userId} AND p.project_key = 'default' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.created_at ASC, p.id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workspace (id, name, slug, created_by) VALUES (#{workspaceId}, #{name}, #{slug}, #{userId,jdbcType=OTHER}) ON CONFLICT (slug) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, created_by = EXCLUDED.created_by, deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE workspace.created_by = EXCLUDED.created_by

INSERT INTO workspace_member (workspace_id, user_id, role, status) VALUES (#{workspaceId}, #{userId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{role}, 'ACTIVE') ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET role = EXCLUDED.role, status = 'ACTIVE', updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO project (id, workspace_id, name, project_key, base_url, created_by) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{workspaceId}, #{name}, #{projectKey}, #{baseUrl}, #{userId,jdbcType=OTHER}) ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, project_key) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, base_url = EXCLUDED.base_url, created_by = EXCLUDED.created_by, status = 'ACTIVE', deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO project_member (project_id, user_id, role) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{userId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{role}) ON CONFLICT (project_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET role = EXCLUDED.role, updated_at = NOW()
